description: Downloadable, runnable code resources organized by developer skill. Each subdirectory is self-contained and can be copied directly into a project. Resources are the execution counterpart to the skill .md files.

resources.description: React app starter with @pushchain/ui-kit — wallet connection, send universal tx, cascade pattern
Node.js scripts for @pushchain/core — ethers.js, viem, and Solana signer setups with send examples
Solidity interfaces and a minimal complete multichain contract for Push Chain native contracts
